request_payload.exposure_text: Strategic autonomy isn't just about military strength—it's about protecting our way of life. When we rely too much on others for critical tech and supplies, we're one crisis away from chaos. Look at how quickly supply chains collapsed during the pandemic. Imagine if that happened with defense systems. We need to invest in our own capabilities now, before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
